title: Don’t have PAN or taxable income? You must file Form 157 before travelling abroad
summary: Under the old IT regime, PAN was mandatory for filing ‘Form 156’ that was required to be filed by outbound travellers. While ‘Form 156’ could be filed on the e-filing portal of the IT department in the old regime, ‘Form 157’ can be done only manually under the IT Act, 2025.
